text:
Here are **10 recent papers on auditory brainstem response (ABR)** from PubMed, sorted by date:

---

## 📚 Recent ABR Papers (2025–2026)

### 1. Comparison of NB Chirp ABR and 40 Hz AERP in Normal Hearing Adults
- **Authors:** Gao Y, et al.
- **Journal:** Fa Yi Xue Za Zhi (2025)
- **DOI:** [10.12116/j.issn.1004-5619.2024.240709](https://doi.org/10.12116/j.issn.1004-5619.2024.240709)
- **TLDR:** Investigates the relationship between narrowband Chirp ABR thresholds, 40 Hz AERP thresholds, and pure-tone audiometry in normal-hearing adults.

### 2. Superenhancer-mediated ferroptosis in age-related hearing loss
- **Authors:** Zhang C, Yang T, Luo X, Fu X, Sun Y, Yuan W
- **Journal:** Cell Mol Life Sci (2026, online ahead of print)
- **DOI:** [10.1007/s00018-026-06117-0](https://doi.org/10.1007/s00018-026-06117-0)
- **TLDR:** Uses ABR measurements + epigenomics to show superenhancer-mediated ferroptosis drives age-related hearing loss. SE inhibitor JQ-1 shows protective effects in vivo.

### 3. TRPV2 upregulation exacerbates age-related hearing loss via oxidative stress in spiral ganglion neurons
- **Authors:** Zhang Z, Yin H, Cao H, An M, Li Y, Yang J, Liu T, Wang J, Zhao L, Wang C, Miao R, Wang B
- **Journal:** Mol Brain (2026, online ahead of print)
- **DOI:** [10.1186/s13041-026-01286-2](https://doi.org/10.1186/s13041-026-01286-2)
- **TLDR:** TRPV2 activation in pre-senescent mice accelerates high-frequency hearing damage, measured via ABR. Links ion channel activity to oxidative stress in spiral ganglion neurons.

### 4. Delayed pharmacological treatment attenuates noise-induced tinnitus in rats
- **Authors:** Lu J, Du X, Yokell Z, Cai Q, Cheng W, Nakmali D, Li W, Huang X, Kopke RD, West MB
- **Journal:** Sci Rep (2026, online ahead of print)
- **DOI:** [10.1038/s41598-026-40960-2](https://doi.org/10.1038/s41598-026-40960-2)
- **TLDR:** NHPN-1010 treatment increases ABR wave-I amplitudes and presynaptic ribbon counts in IHCs, suggesting therapeutic potential for noise-induced tinnitus.

### 5. Sleep recovers prior to hearing after single high-intensity noise exposure in mice
- **Authors:** Tan J, Jia W, Yang S, Ruan J, Han Z
- **Journal:** Hear Res (2026)
- **DOI:** [10.1016/j.heares.2026.109594](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.heares.2026.109594)
- **TLDR:** Compares ABR threshold recovery vs sleep architecture recovery after noise exposure. Sleep normalizes faster than hearing — interesting dissociation.

### 6. Inner ear transplantation of cochlear progenitor cells restores acute sensorineural hearing loss
- **Authors:** Liu S, Li R, Wang F, Wang Y, Liu K
- **Journal:** Neuroscience (2026)
- **DOI:** [10.1016/j.neuroscience.2026.02.046](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.neuroscience.2026.02.046)
- **TLDR:** Cochlear progenitor cell transplantation restores hearing in mice, confirmed by ABR testing 2 weeks post-transplant.

### 7. Precision therapy for noise-induced hearing loss: transcriptome-guided drug repurposing + hydrogel delivery
- **Authors:** Cai Q, Shi M, Chen J, Kong C, Wang X, Yuan Y, Lu J, Zheng D, Sun Y
- **Journal:** Biomater Sci (2026)
- **DOI:** [10.1039/d6bm00030d](https://doi.org/10.1039/d6bm00030d)
- **TLDR:** Closed-loop paradigm combining transcriptomics with in situ hydrogel delivery. Shows 15 dB ABR threshold rescue at 24 kHz.

### 8. Elevated ABR thresholds with preserved otoacoustic emissions (case series)
- **Authors:** Tufatulin GS, Khairulina SI, Kreisman MV, et al.
- **Journal:** Vestn Otorinolaringol (2026)
- **DOI:** [10.17116/otorino20269101176](https://doi.org/10.17116/otorino20269101176)
- **TLDR:** Atypical cases with preserved OAEs but elevated ABR thresholds — wave V morphology and latency remain normal. Relevant to auditory neuropathy spectrum disorder diagnosis.

### 9. Comparison of pure tone audiometry and ASSR thresholds in adults
- **Authors:** Garbaruk ES, Vikhnina SM, Golovanova LE, Pustovoit NV, Boboshko MY
- **Journal:** Vestn Otorinolaringol (2026)
- **DOI:** [10.17116/otorino20269101111](https://doi.org/10.17116/otorino20269101111)
- **TLDR:** Compares PTA with ASSR for objective hearing evaluation. ABR and ASSR mainly used when subjective testing isn't possible.

### 10. 🦇 In-flight brainstem responses to self-emitted echolocation calls in bats
- **Authors:** Tarnovsky YC, Sheinin A, Laufer A, Yovel Y
- **Journal:** Proc Biol Sci (2026)
- **DOI:** [10.1098/rspb.2025.2988](https://doi.org/10.1098/rspb.2025.2988)
- **TLDR:** First non-invasive ABR recordings from *flying* bats! Self-emitted echolocation calls evoke ABRs with a distinct pre-auditory wave — super cool methodological advance.

---

**Total PubMed results:** 16,551 papers. These are the most recent 10.

Want me to narrow the search? I can filter by speech-evoked ABR specifically, or focus on clinical vs. animal studies, a particular year range, or specific topics like auditory neuropathy, speech-in-noise, or neural encoding.
